methods.description: Process for refining the stratigraphy and sedimentological characteristics of the Ficoncella site through core drilling and analysis.

steps.description: A 25 m-long well was drilled into the terrace above the site using a double corer with a diameter of 12 cm.
steps.searchable_summary: drill a 25 m-long well using a double corer

steps.description: The core was split into two parts for its entire length and described for grain size, textural attributes, sedimentary structure, and color.
steps.searchable_summary: split and describe core sample for various attributes

steps.description: Pollen analysis was carried out on hyena coprolites.
steps.searchable_summary: perform pollen analysis on hyena coprolites

steps.description: 40 Ar/39 Ar dating was performed on sanidine grains extracted from the outcropping ignimbrite unit.
steps.searchable_summary: perform 40 Ar/39 Ar dating on sanidine grains

methods.description: Determination of major and minor element compositions on micro-pumice fragments and/or glass shards from the tephra layer using an electron microprobe.

steps.description: Analyses were carried out using a Cameca SX50 electron microprobe equipped with a five-wavelength dispersive spectrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: use electron microprobe for element composition analysis

steps.description: To evaluate the accuracy of the EMP analyses, three international secondary standards were analyzed prior to the measurements.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze secondary standards for accuracy evaluation
